seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email must include specific reasons for my resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances.
new_constraint: Do not include any reasons for your resignation in the email.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must include specific reasons for my resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances. Do not include any reasons for your resignation in the email.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Date, e.g., two weeks from today].

While I have truly enjoyed my time here and appreciate the opportunities I've had to grow within the team, I have decided to pursue a new professional path that aligns more closely with my long-term career goals. Additionally, I am navigating some personal circumstances that require me to focus on my well-being and family at this time.

I want to ensure a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am happy to assist in training my replacement, documenting my current projects, or helping to wrap up any ongoing tasks. Please let me know how I can best support the team during this period.

Thank you for the opportunity to work alongside you and the entire team. I wish you and [Company Name] continued success in the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
